items.title: The Mandalorian and Grogu should have been a season of TV

items.title: High Speed 2 to Cost up to £103 Billion After More Delays
items.summary: The UK’s High Speed 2 rail line will cost between £87.7 billion ($117 billion) and £102.7 billion and open by 2036 at the earliest, Transport Secretary Heidi Alexander said, revealing the latest budget increase and delay to the troubled project.
items.summary_ja: The UK’s High Speed 2 rail line will cost between £87.7 billion ($117 billion) and £102.7 billion and open by 2036 at the earliest, Transport Secretary Heidi Alexander said, revealing the latest budget increase and delay to the troubled project.

items.title: French Grid Keeps Nuclear Reactors Online Despite Solar Surge
items.summary: France’s grid operator is keeping extra nuclear reactors online to keep the system stable despite strong solar power generation, contributing to a supply surplus and deeply discounted electricity prices.
items.summary_ja: France’s grid operator is keeping extra nuclear reactors online to keep the system stable despite strong solar power generation, contributing to a supply surplus and deeply discounted electricity prices.

items.title: Jeff Currie Says AI Boom Sets Up Commodities for Decade-Long Run
items.summary: Veteran strategist Jeff Currie said the world is in the early stages of a commodity supercycle that may last another decade or more as the artificial intelligence buildout collides with chronic underinvestment in energy and materials capacity.
items.summary_ja: Veteran strategist Jeff Currie said the world is in the early stages of a commodity supercycle that may last another decade or more as the artificial intelligence buildout collides with chronic underinvestment in energy and materials capacity.

items.title: Former FTX Executive Launches a ‘No Loss’ AI Trading Platform
items.summary: At the European arm of failed crypto exchange FTX, Patrick Gruhn watched as traders repeatedly lost money on risky bets. Now, he’s launching a product where the savviest investors can turn a profit — even while putting zero capital at stake.
items.summary_ja: At the European arm of failed crypto exchange FTX, Patrick Gruhn watched as traders repeatedly lost money on risky bets. Now, he’s launching a product where the savviest investors can turn a profit — even while putting zero capital at stake.

items.title: NYSE’s Owner Plans Its Own Futures Market for Computing Power

items.summary: 19日の東京株式市場、このところ値上がりしていた半導体関連銘柄を中心に、当面の利益を確保するための売り注文が出て日経平均株価は小幅に値下がりしました。
items.summary_ja: 19日の東京株式市場、このところ値上がりしていた半導体関連銘柄を中心に、当面の利益を確保するための売り注文が出て日経平均株価は小幅に値下がりしました。

items.title: 人気ゲームが「AI動画コンテスト」を開催したところレビュー低評価爆撃を食らい謝罪
items.summary: キュートな動物でわちゃわちゃ格闘するパーティアクションゲーム「Party Animals」はSteamで累計1万7000件以上の最高評価を獲得するなど人気を博していました。しかし、開発元のRecreate Gamesが「Party Animals」のキャラクターを元にしたAI生成動画のコンテストを告知したところ、多くのバッシングが集まりRecreate Gamesは謝罪した上でコンテストの開催についてユーザーの意見を募りました。続きを読む...

items.title: ローマ教皇レオ14世が初の回勅で「AI時代における人間の保護」について語る予定、イベントにはAnthropic共同創業者も参加
items.summary: ローマ教皇のレオ14世が2026年5月25日、自身初となる回勅を公布する予定だと発表されました。回勅はローマ教皇から全世界の司教に宛てる形で公布される文書であり、レオ14世の回勅は「人工知能の時代における人間の保護」をテーマにしたものだとのことです。続きを読む...
